1. android boot squence!

以pixel3xl手机来分析，这里以aosp的源码和固件为展开，为什么是pixel主要是没有别的手机
一些基础的概念，在这里没有提及，主要是为了记录思路。

1.1. 电源启动流程

高通
android 启动流程的分析
PBL->SBL1->SBL2->SBL3->aboot
这个是以前的加载过程，现在已经吧SBL压缩成一个XBL了。
PBL->XBL->aboot
explain：
PBL (Qualcomm’s Primary Bootloader)
XBL (Qualcomm’s Secondary/eXtensible Bootloader)
aboot就是android bootloader
aboot中解锁就是解锁引导程序锁定状态.
aboot来自于开源的little kernel

1.2. bootloader分区

使用imjtool工具解开.
bootloader本身就有一套分区来用，文件格式是FBPK镜像，如图：

1.3. boot分区

boot.img文件的获取方式：可直接root 条件dd if=/dev/block/by-name/boot of=/sdcard/boot.img
或者直接解开对应版本的factory image.

1.3.1. boot启动

包括了kernel和ramdisk，参考/system/core/mkboot.img
bootloader通过mkbootimg长生的bootimg.h文件，更新kernel header包括了位置和ramdisk 大小在flash中，kernel的基地址，和命令行参数等。
ab分区的看一下getprops 来检查当前激活的分区.

1.3.2. kernel

kernel标准格式zImage、Image、Image.gz和ramdisk镜像一起刷入boot分区，从内存中启动。后边连着DTB

1.3.3. ramdisk

包括root file system mount as a rootfs.和kernel一起被mkbootfs 做成了boot flash到boot分区.

1.3.4. file system

文件系统有system、userdata、recovery.image. must use Yaffs2 format or sparse image format.

1.4. vbmeta.img

验证boot.img是否被修改.
使用avbtool工具生成，也是有A/B分区.
还有一个libavb库来验证签名，参考文件avb_sysdeps.h和函数avb_slot_verify
关闭vb验证；使用原本的vbmeta镜像刷入
fastboot --disable-verity --disable-verification flash vbmeta vbmeta.img
这一块的原理可以查看fastboot 源码来分析看到是在vbmeta.img的0x120offset的位置置位！.magisk的处理方式可以参考.

1.5. xbl镜像

我解开了crosshatch的刷机包
xbl_config.img 文件

The UEFI firmware on Qualcomm chips is contained in the XBL - the eXtensible BootLoader. This is composed of two components: the SBL (Secondary BootLoader) executes first to initialize the RAM before passing control to the UEFI firmware.

解文件

uefi-firmware-parser -b -e  /image/xbl.img
7z x volume-549696/file-9e21fd93-9c72-4c15-8c4b-e77f1db2d792/section0.guid
uefi-firmware-parser -b section0
uefi-firmware-parser -b crosshatch-pd1a.180720.030/image/abl.img

abl里边显示这里有三个模块。分别是

三个程序是:

one application for Fastboot flashing, one application for booting the Linux kernel, and one driver for handling Fastboot USB communications

这里很像AndroidFastbootTransportUsbDxe
参考网址:https://worthdoingbadly.com/qcomxbl/

1.6. magisk

magisk的原理就是修改和替换了boot.img中的Ramdisk，ramdisk包括初始化init进程和启动时使用的rc文件。

1.7. 杂项

18年后的高通引导方式框图

1.7.1. 三星

Samsung’s use of the eMMC CID/a corresponding hashed blob of the CID in the aboot image to dictate developer (unlock) status.

1.8. 制作一个uart串口工具

这个工具还hi是

1.9. 术语解释

  • Bootloader: A general term for a link in the boot-chain that has a specific job that is run each cold-boot
  • cold-boot: Fresh boot from powered off state
  • QFUSE: Microscopic hardware fuse that is integrated into the SoC - Once physically blown, impossible to reset or replace
  • SoC: System-on-chip (your phone’s “motherboard” of sorts)
  • EFUSE: Software based fuse whose data is stored in QFPROM
  • QFPROM: Qualcomm’s fuse region
  • TrustZone: Qualcomm ARM chipset’s “Secure World” implementation
  • QSEECOM: A linux kernel driver that lets us communicate with TrustZone, and issue an SCM call to TrustZone to do things like blow fuses. It only will allow signed applets and approved calls to be made
  • SCM: Secure Channel Manager (note: not related to Linux’s SMC calls)
  • DTB: Device Tree Blob. Its purpose is to “provide a way to describe non-discoverable hardware” to Linux, read more here
  • Android Verified Boot (AVB): A strict set of checks implemented at the aboot/ABL level to verify the integrity of various parts of the operating system, read more here
  • DM-Verity: A component of Android Verified Boot that checks partitions to see if they have beeen mounted read/write before, read more here
  • system_as_root: A new mount setup logic for android that mounts the system partition as ‘/’ as opposed to ‘/system’. This means that system files now live at ‘/system/system’. This is a way for Qualcomm to check whether ‘/’ has ever been remounted read/write under Verified Boot. It also introduces the new standard that the Android ramdisk be stored on the system partition, as opposed to being stored in the boot image

>
